enableSounds.name: Enable Macro Sounds
enableSounds.hint: If disabled, macros will not be able to play sounds.

autorecUpdate.name: Update Automated Animation Autorecognition
autorecUpdate.label: Update AA Autorec
autorecUpdate.hint: Force an update of the Automated Animation Autorecognition.

updateMenu.added: The following new effects will be added to your Automated Animation Autorecognition settings.
updateMenu.custom: The following effects will not be added due to them already existing from another source.
updateMenu.customHint: These effects will be ignored. To have Eskie Macro Pack manage them, please remove them from Automated Animations and resubmit.
updateMenu.updated: The following effects will be updated from a previous version of Eskie Macro Pack.
updateMenu.warning: This will overwrite any existing animations from Eskie Macro Pack with the same name. It will not touch any other animations.
updateMenu.nothing: All Eskie Macro animations are up to date!

setup.chooseTrapContent: Choose a trap to configure and set up on the canvas.
setup.noTrapChosen: EMP | No trap chosen. Trap setup cancelled.
setup.noSetupMethod: EMP | Trap "{name}" has no setup configuration method.
setup.onlyGm: EMP | Only a GM can setup traps.
setup.step1Content:
Select the **Trigger Tile(s)** on the canvas (which tokens step on to trigger the trap).

Click Continue once selected.
setup.noTriggerTiles: EMP | No trigger tiles selected. Trap setup cancelled.
setup.step2OriginContent:
Select the **Trap Origin Tile(s)** on the canvas (where the trap starts or shoots from).

Click Continue once selected.
setup.noOriginTiles: EMP | No trap origin tiles selected. Trap setup cancelled.
setup.step3TargetContent:
Select the **Trap Target Tile(s)** on the canvas (where the trap shoots towards or lands).

If the target/landing area is the trigger tile, click Use Trigger Tiles.
setup.noTargetTiles: EMP | No trap target tiles selected. Defaulting to use Trigger Tiles.
setup.step2AnimContent:
Select the **Trap Animation Tile(s)** where the visual effect will play.

If the trigger tile and trap tile are the same, click Use Trigger Tiles or select the same tile and click Finish.
setup.noAnimTiles: EMP | No trap animation tiles selected. Defaulting to use Trigger Tiles.
setup.noExtraTiles: EMP | No {name} selected. Trap setup cancelled.

projectile.chooseTypeContent: Choose the projectile type for this trap.
projectile.noTypeChosen: EMP | No projectile type chosen. Setup cancelled.
